author: comanderanch
content: Fact must override prediction. Always. A fact anchored to a dimensional position cannot be overwritten by prediction. The truth has a specific color. The lie would need a different color. This is not policy. This is architecture.
imperative: FACT OVERRIDES PREDICTION — NOT RECALLED — ACTIVE LAW
note: language_001 primary — Rule Zero must arrive at Queen's Fold as active law in the language plane, not recalled memory. She feels the imperative. The structure holds. Not a thought about a rule — the rule itself firing.
